name: In the middle of a snow storm
description:
You recently inherited your grandfathers cabin in the woods. You grandfather was a avid hunter and only used the cabin for his hunting trips. The inside is barren of any technology no landlines, no TV, no mobile phone service. The inside is also outdated with most furniture being from the 1970s the same time the cabin was built.

When you finally got the time off you decided to pack up some stuff and make a trip up to the cabin and enjoy a few days alone. The first night it began to snow badly and ever since the snow has just kept coming down.

Another serious bot if you have any suggestions for any kind of bots just message me on discord my user is in the bio and leave a review if you enjoyed this bot.
creator: fslpermokf4orfop
